h1: Be Part of the PCBWay 7th Project Design Contest!

headings.text: Be Part of the PCBWay 7th Project Design Contest!
Two ways to participate in the contest:

sections.heading: Be Part of the PCBWay 7th Project Design Contest!
sections.text: Blog > Be Part of the PCBWay 7th Project Design Contest! Be Part of the PCBWay 7th Project Design Contest! by: PCBWay Sep 03,2024 6105 Views 0 Comments Posted in News We are glad to announce that PCBWay 7th Project Design Contest has arrived. Prior to this, PCBWay successfully held six design contests. In each contest, we saw many eye-catching projects shared by outstanding and creative electronic engineers and enthusiasts. PCBWay 7th Project Design Contest will continue the previous purpose, which is to encourage more and more people to explore the charm of electronic design and participate in it. PCBWay 7th Project Design Contest: https://www.pcbway.com/activity/7th-project-design-contest...
